_comment: Batch request template — OpenAI + Pexels + edge-tts + subtitles. No API keys here.
_usage: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/videos with one of the items below (minus _comment fields)

shared_params.video_script_prompt: Write exactly 75 to 90 words total. No more. Start with a strong hook sentence that grabs attention immediately. Use short, punchy sentences throughout. Sound like a confident voiceover narrator, not an essay. No motivational clichés. No filler openers. No markdown, no titles, no formatting. Plain narration text only.

topics.video_subject: How to Focus in a Distracted World
Small Habits That Compound Over Time
How AI Can Help You Work Smarter
